lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjt failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect

lists.37896: Seat belt telltale command monitoring (external telltale)
lists.37909: High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Language_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the language used for messages displayed.

CarburationType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the carburation type of the vehicle.

DistanceUnit_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the distance unit type (km or miles).

VolumeUnit_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the volume unit of the vehicle.

TripComputerType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer type displayed.

TyrePressureUnit_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the tyre pressure unit displayed.

ParkingBrakeType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the parking brake type (manual or assisted).

OverspeedWarningPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of overspeed warning (10204_1).

VolumeFuelWarning_CF.comment: used to define the threshold below low fuel level warning occurs.

TripDistanceKm.comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

TripFuelUsed.comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

TripTimer.comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

L0Value.comment: This parameter is the measure of fuel gauge sensor converted in litre using Vx_FUNC_Rx table.

lists.2: Circuit short to battery or open circuit

lists.5: Out of range (measured resistance doesn't match with defined resistance ranges)

UPAMMI_CF.comment: parameter allows identifying the presence of UPA Ultrasonic Park Assist display & sound in Cluster.

TPMSMMI_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMS or TPW display in cluster

ESCMMI_CF.comment: This parameter is used for ESC message filtering(only 20403_4)

ExternalTemperature_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the external temperature management.

TemperatureUnit_CF.comment: Defines the default temperature unit that must be displayed by the Cluster ECU

DimmingStrategy_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define which kind of dimmer is used in the vehicle

lists.0: Without R// or DIAG by CAN

NivocodSensorType_CF.comment: whether or not brake fluid level sensor has // resistor to distinguish normaly open circ vs no senso

MSCOilChgInitialDistanceInKM_CF.comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualDistanceInKM !

MSCOilChgInitialPeriodInDay_CF.comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualPeriodInDay !

MSCOilChgUsualDistanceInKM.comment: Is the current value displayed for the Oil Schedule Change in km.

FrontSBRInhibition_CF.comment: This parameter allows the activation or not of sound only for Front SBR warning (10104,10105)

lists.7: Overflow of Electrical consumption value (EV specific)

WelcomeSequenceInhibition_CF.comment: This configuration is used to activate or deactivate the welcome sequence

lists.8: L2 is initialized with Diag request

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeUSM.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeACU.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeBRAKE_ABS_V.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeEPKB.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeAT.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeECM.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeEPS.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeHFM.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeFRONT_CAMER.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeMULTIMEDIA_.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeMBL.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeEBA.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

VNode_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.VNodeTPW.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

VNode_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.VNodeTPMS.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

VNode_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.VNodeECALL.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

VehicleGUIStyle_CF.comment: Allows to change the representation of the vehicle in the graphism shown in the TFT

TACStrategy_CF.comment: This parameter allows to select which filtering strategy of RPM pointer shall be used.

WelcomeSequenceType_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the welcome sequence variants (dependant on IVI generation)

OilLevelPresent_CF.comment: Allows identifying the presence of oil level management (10102_x) and DTC management

MSCOilChgWarningThresholdKM_CF.comment: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilomet

lists.3: Present with OCS AND cluster internal counter

MSCOilDistanceCounterPresent_CF.comment: allows to define if Draining distance counter is displayed on Cluster and value computation strategy

MSCOilTimeCounterPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define if Draining timer is displayed

MSCServDistanceCounterPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define if Service distance counter is displayed

MSCServTimeCounterPresent_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define if Service timer is displayed

MSCServiceWarningThresholdKM_CF.comment: Used to define the first warning threshold for Service schedule in kilometer.

FuelRangeCorrectKmAutonom_CF.comment: Define what t is the distance range on which the driving range is computed. Cf. Data doc field

MexType_CF.comment: Used to identifying the management of the current driving mode

S1Kmin_CF.comment: parameter is used as a weighting (usually <1) to the fuel consumption for L2 computation.

S1Kmaj_CF.comment: parameter is used as a weighting (usually >1) to the fuel consumption for L2 computation.

S2Kmaj_CF.comment: parameter is used as a weighting (usually >1) to the fuel consumption for L2 computation.

S3Kmaj_CF.comment: parameter is used as a weighting (usually >1) to the fuel consumption for L2 computation.

TripFuelLPG.comment: Used for LPG trip computer calculations

TripFuelCNG.comment: Used for CNG trip computer calculations

L3DuringFuelReadjust.comment: This parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update what

L2offDuringFuelReadjust.comment: This parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update w

L0onDuringFuelReadjust.comment: This parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update wh

ExtECUDistBeforeReadjust.comment: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence)

lists.5: Out of range (measured resistance doesn't match with defined resistance range)

lists.0: DO NOT USE Phantom PV without badging
lists.1: DO NOT USE Phantom PV Renault
lists.2: DO NOT USE Phantom PV Dacia
lists.3: DO NOT USE Phantom PV Lada
lists.4: DO NOT USE Phantom PV Nissan
lists.5: DO NOT USE Phantom PV Alpine
lists.6: DO NOT USE Phantom LCV without badging
lists.7: DO NOT USE Phantom LCV Renault
lists.8: DO NOT USE Phantom LCV Dacia
lists.9: DO NOT USE Phantom LCV Lada
lists.10: DO NOT USE Phantom LCV Nissan

EgocarType_CF.comment: Used to display the ego car according to the vehicle type

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

ClusterUserSetPresent_CF.comment: Allows identifying the presence of User setting menu in the cluster

DIM_OutputWhenDayNightOnly_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define backlight level during night in Day/Night mode

DPFManualRegenMMI_CF.comment: This parameter allows to activate DPF regen procedure page in the ADAC loop

DIM_DayNightModifiedByPCFN_CF.comment: This configuration used to force dimming off when PCFN/DisplayRequest =0.

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

ClusterDistBeforeReadjust.comment: Cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN or cluster incoherence)

ClockDisplayMode_CF.comment: This parameter allows to display the clock info in different format dpending on market requirements.

lists.1: Clock Displayed from CAN / RTC OFF
lists.2: Clock displayed / Not set / RTC ON
lists.3: Clock displayed and set / RTC ON
lists.4: Clock display and set / RTC in Radio

Clock_CF.comment: Allows identifying the display AND management (includes setting) of the clock (CodingInstructions!)

ChargingPlugTelltaleVariant_CF.comment: This parameter allows to deal with the charging plug telltale color diversity (China regulation)

ATBeepInR_CF.comment: Used to allow to emit a sound in case of AT switched to R.

lists.7: Overflow of electrical consumption value (EV specific)
Overflow of electrical consumption value (EV specific)

OutputControl_Buttons.Value.comment: This service is able to manage permanently pointer(s) driven by the microcontroller.

lists.1: Main Display Black image (TFT + backlight ON)
lists.2: Main display - All segments ON (if LCD) or white for TFT
lists.4: Main display - All pixels ON color 1 (Design_Red)
lists.6: Main display - All pixels ON color 2 (Design_Green)
lists.8: Main display - All pixels ON color 3 (Design_Blue)
lists.12: Main display - inverted chess pattern ON
lists.14: Main display  All pixels ON color Design_Jaune
lists.16: Main display  All pixels ON color Design_CyanFonce
lists.18: Main display All pixels ON color Design_Rose
lists.20: Main display  All pixels ON color Design_Orange
lists.22: Main display  All pixels ON color Design_BleuCiel
lists.24: Main display  All pixels ON color Design_Violet
lists.26: Main display  All pixels ON color Design_NavyBlue
lists.28: Main display  All pixels ON color Design_Vertdeau
lists.30: Main display  All pixels ON color Design_Orangefonce
lists.32: Main display All pixels ON color Design_RougeLight

OutputControl_Display.Value.comment: This service is able to manage permanently the display(s) driven by the microcontroller.

OutputControl_Backlight.Value.comment: This service is able to manage permanently the backlight(s) driven by the microcontroller.

lists.0: All pointers are at rest position

GAU_TempoForVU_CF.comment: Used to adapt fuel stabilization temporization to LCV/CDV (big fuel tanks)

I_BoosterSafetybag_CF.comment: Used to inhibite the safetybag function for I-booster, function present in some EV/PHEV/HEV vehicles

EgocarColor_CF.comment: This configuration is used to defined egocar color when egocar feature is not managed by calibration

Node_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.NodeETC_4GRIP.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

LDWMMI_CF.comment: used to defined if buzzer shall be played by cluster or not when LDW crossing alert occurs

CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number.comment: BUIC line number related to last stop alert (MBD parameter : CauseStop)
BUIC line number related to last service alert (MBD parameter : CauseService)

RadioDisplayManagedInCluster_CF.comment: Mgmt of the radio display in the cluster depending on R020 or A-IVI presence on CAN M

GaugingThresholdLow_CF.comment: This configuration parameter is used to select the Kmin/Kmaj parameters for the "low level":

FuelReadjustL2offL0_CF.comment: This configuration is used as threshold for L2offL0 readjustement(big gap):

FuelReadjustNearFullL2_CF.comment: parameter is used to define the near full area and select the associated readjustement mode

V0FuncR0Volume_CF.comment: This configuration define a Volume used in the conversation Resistance to Volume.

V0FuncR0Resistance_CF.comment: V0FuncR0 is the bottom of the tank

V1FuncR1Volume_CF.comment: This configuration define a Volume used in the conversation Resistance to Volume.

V1FuncR1Resistance_CF.comment: This configuration define a Resistance used in the conversation Resistance to Volume

V2FuncR2Resistance_CF.comment: This configuration define a Resistance used in the conversation Resistance to Volume

V3FuncR3Resistance_CF.comment: This configuration define a Resistance used in the conversation Resistance to Volume

V4FuncR4Resistance_CF.comment: This configuration define a Resistance used in the conversation Resistance to Volume

V5FuncR5Resistance_CF.comment: This configuration define a Resistance used in the conversation Resistance to Volume

V6FuncR6Resistance_CF.comment: This configuration define a Resistance used in the conversation Resistance to Volume

V7FuncR7Resistance_CF.comment: This configuration define a Resistance used in the conversation Resistance to Volume

V8FuncR8Resistance_CF.comment: This configuration define a Resistance used in the conversation Resistance to Volume

V8FuncR8Volume_CF.comment: This configuration define a Volume used in the conversation Resistance to Volume.

V9FuncR9Resistance_CF.comment: This configuration define a Resistance used in the conversation Resistance to Volume

V9FuncR9Volume_CF.comment: This configuration define a Volume used in the conversation Resistance to Volume.

V10FuncR10Volume_CF.comment: This configuration define a Volume used in the conversation Resistance to Volume.

V10FuncR10Resistance_CF.comment: V10funcR10 the top of the tank

DWMMIPage_CF.comment: This configuration is used to activated a dedicated page for DW feature (Entry Cluster Only)

GAU_SloshInhibitionStrategyActivation_CF.comment: This parameter is used to define if the slosh inhibition strategy is activated or not

lists.1: NOK  Petrol gauging calibration error detection

lists.0: Trip Unit has been correctly configured
lists.1: Trip Unit has not been correctly configured

FuelReadjustL2ZeroSpeed_CF.comment: parameter is used as threshold for L2ZeroSpeed readjustement mode (IGN ON mode):

FuelReadjustNearFullL0L3_CF.comment: This configuration is used as threshold for near full L0L3 readjustement(rental mode):

TripComputerSwitchAcqui_CF.comment: This parameter allows to define the trip computer switch acquisition strategy (Wire Or CAN)

BackupVolumeFuelWarning_CF.comment: This configuration parameter is used to trig the low fuel alert based on Lbackup signal.

MSCOilChangeUsualPeriodInDay.comment: Is the current value displayed for the Oil Schedule Change in day.

MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget.comment: MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget = current odometer + distance before draining

MSCGeneralOdoServiceTarget.comment: General Odometer value when service is due

MSCGeneralOdoOilChgTarget.comment: General Odometer value when oil draining is due

VNodeConfigurationError_Part1.comment: Not used, but for reserve (temp data for DDT2000)

SecondRowFourthSafetyBelt_CF.comment: This value is the odometer target when oil change is due

TripComputerHWSwitchType_CF.comment: allows to address the steering wheel command diversity when the cluster is doing the acquisition

Uoil1.comment: First voltage measure done during a "oil level" measurement procedure

Uoil2.comment: Second voltage measure done during a "oil level" measurement procedure

Uoil1_timing.comment: Real timing in ms between current injection and Uoil1 measure (functional target ~10ms)

StartCause.comment: StartCause allows to define the wakeup type of the current mission

VNode_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.VNodeSONAR_UPA.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

VNode_ECUPresent_Part1_CF.VNodeAVM_RearV.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECU. Used for ECU frame lost & ErrorProg

SBR_RightHandDriveVehicle_CF.comment: This parameter is used to adpat front SBR vignette display on right hand drive vehicle

LuxSensor_1.comment: This parameter is used for reading the value of the lux sensor 1

ClusterCurrentDistanceByDIAG.comment: allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km.

DistUpdateByDiagCounter.comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance update number with DIAG request.

DistUpdateByExtECUCounter.comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU

LuxSensor_2.comment: This parameter is used for reading the value of the lux sensor 2

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

RollerBenchMenuActivation_CF.comment: This parameter allows to activate / deactive OEM roller bench menu for operator in plant and/or afte

RoutineIdentifierList.comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.

ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min.comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max.comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

OilPressureState.comment: Used for the information about state of Oil pressure

DynamicTacho_CF.comment: This configuration is used to know which CAN signal the tachometer feature uses and to adapt the fil

DIM_DayNightIfPositionLights_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence and activation of the Automatic Head Lamps function

DisplayableLanguage_P2_CF.Portuguese_Por.comment: This parameter allows to have some languages selectable by the driver (mask)

OILFlags.Flag Sensor Hot.comment: Used for reading algo flags for oil level

NumberResetsWithBURAMLoss.comment: This parameter is used to count the number of resets caused by fai

DeltaT_OilMeasure.comment: Real timing measured between Uoil1 and Uoil2 voltage measure (functional target ~875ms)

NumberDiagnosticResets.comment: This counter is incremented each time a reset is requested from diagnostic tools (routine 11xx)

NumberSafetyResets.comment: This counter is incremented each time a reset is requested by a safety mecanisme related to ASIL

NumberResetsWithoutBURAMLoss.comment: This counter is incremented each time a reset without BURAM loss is requested by basic software
